title: Governance — fabric-os regulatory corpus (local override)
purpose: fabric-os keeps a thin governance corpus for regulatory readiness artifacts (SOC2 etc.). Normative protocols/constitution remain in canon-os. Local override of canon 08-governance (which is constitution-standards hub only): scopes governance/ to fabric's regulatory child folder.

allowlistNotes.regulatory: fabric-os regulatory readiness corpus (e.g. soc2-readiness-checklist.md). Normative governance stays in canon-os hub.
